title: Growth Energy to EPA: Cellulosic Waiver Runs Counter to RFS Goals
content: Growth Energy, the nationâ€™s largest biofuel trade association, submitted a comment to the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) today in response to EPAâ€™s proposal to partially waive the 2024 cellulosic biofuel volume requirement under the Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS).
author: Aru Somya
